Logic: Set to the active report data-contract version.
Remarks: Required for backward-compatible report rendering.

Logic: Timestamp when the report dataset is finalized for rendering.
Remarks: Store as ISO 8601 with timezone.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Cover, Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Next Session
API Period: Current and prior valid market session
Logic: Rule-engine classification based on the day's triggered alerts and short/lending posture. Exact aggregation policy requires business approval.
Remarks: Example values: Low Closing Risk; Moderate Closing Risk; High Closing Risk; Extreme Closing Risk.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Cover, Daily Report - Executive Close
Logic: Summarize the readiness of all required report domains. Complete only when every required domain is complete; otherwise Partial.
Remarks: Do not infer readiness from carried-forward values.

Logic: Complete when exact-date close price and required daily market fields are available; otherwise Pending or Partial.
Remarks: Allowed display states: AVAILABLE; PARTIAL; PENDING.

Logic: Complete when exact-date required short and lending fields pass validation.
Remarks: Must use the report publication-readiness rule rather than stale prior values.

Logic: Complete when the social collection window has closed and all enabled platforms have completed ingestion.
Remarks: Platforms with legitimately zero records are complete; failed ingestion is pending.

Logic: Complete when SEC filings and verified-event ingestion have completed for the report window.
Remarks: Do not treat no new events as missing data.

Logic: List every required report field that is unavailable with its source domain and expected availability.
Remarks: Used by report readiness and AI uncertainty statements.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Market Performance, Daily Report - Executive Close
Logic: Previous valid market session closing price.
Remarks: Must not use the same session's last intraday quote.

Logic: Official or consolidated opening price for the report session.
Remarks: Needed for market-context analysis.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Cover, Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Market Performance
Logic: Official or consolidated closing price for the report session.
Remarks: This is distinct from the existing generic delayed quote field named price.

Logic: Highest valid traded price during the regular session.
Remarks: Exclude invalid and out-of-session observations according to the market-data policy.

Logic: Lowest valid traded price during the regular session.
Remarks: Exclude invalid and out-of-session observations according to the market-data policy.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Market Performance
API Period: Current and prior valid market session
Logic: closingPrice - priorClose
Remarks: Return null when either required value is missing.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Market Performance, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
API Period: Current and prior valid market session
Logic: (closingPrice - priorClose) / priorClose * 100
Remarks: Return null when priorClose is missing or zero.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Market Performance
Logic: Total consolidated regular-session trading volume.
Remarks: Do not substitute reported short-volume venue totals for consolidated market volume.

Logic: Arithmetic mean of tradeVolume over the prior 20 valid market sessions excluding the current session.
Remarks: Require an agreed minimum number of valid observations before publishing.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Market Performance, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
API Period: Current session and prior 20 valid sessions
Logic: (tradeVolume - averageTradeVolume20D) / averageTradeVolume20D * 100
Remarks: Return null when the baseline is missing or zero.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Market Performance, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
Logic: totalShortVolumeReported / totalVolumeReported * 100
Remarks: Uses existing short-volume vendor inputs; return null when totalVolumeReported is zero or unavailable.

Logic: Array of aligned records: [{tradeDate, closePrice}]. Minimum 20 valid sessions; preferred 60.
Remarks: Missing observations must be null rather than zero.

Logic: Array of aligned records: [{tradeDate, tradeVolume}]. Minimum 20 valid sessions; preferred 60.
Remarks: Use consolidated regular-session volume.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Short and Lending
Logic: Date associated with the latest published short-interest observation.
Remarks: Required because short interest may not update daily.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Narrative and Catalysts, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
Logic: Count valid social records in the immediately preceding non-overlapping 24-hour window.
Remarks: Use the same enabled-platform and deduplication rules as current mentions.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Narrative and Catalysts, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
Logic: currentMentions - priorMentions
Remarks: Return null when the prior window has not completed.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Narrative and Catalysts, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
Logic: (currentMentions - priorMentions) / priorMentions * 100
Remarks: Define the zero-prior-window policy explicitly; recommended output is null rather than infinity.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Narrative and Catalysts, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
Logic: currentSentimentScore - priorSentimentScore
Remarks: Uses the existing positive=100 neutral=50 negative=0 scoring method.

Portal UI: Daily Report - Executive Close, Daily Report - Top Daily Alerts
API Period: Exact report date and prior valid session
Logic: Evaluate approved deterministic rules; rank by severity then priority then absolute change percent; output up to 3 objects containing id, title, text, severity, priority, metric, currentValue, priorValue, change and changePercent.
Remarks: AI may explain these alerts but must not decide whether they triggered.

Logic: Return up to 4 verified same-day event objects containing id, category, occurredAt, title, summary, severity, sourceUrl and verificationStatus.
Remarks: May include confirmed press releases corporate actions ownership changes strategic-float changes and exchange/compliance events.

API Period: Next market session and known future dates
Logic: Return known scheduled event objects containing id, category, scheduledAt, title, sourceUrl and verificationStatus.
Remarks: Known events only; do not include AI predictions.

Logic: Calculate approved observable watch levels and select up to 4 objects containing id, metric, currentValue, watchLevel, direction, title, text and severity.
Remarks: Initial rules: borrow fee = current + max(5, current*10%); shortable shares = current*85%; utilization = min(100,current+5); days to cover = current + max(0.5,current*10%).

Logic: Generate 70-110 words explaining closing posture dominant driver what changed uncertainty and the single most important next-session implication.
Remarks: Canonical field for the current template; replaces the underspecified legacy report Executive Summary row.

Logic: Generate 55-90 words explaining price and volume behavior liquidity quality unusual moves and whether the close confirmed or contradicted short-pressure signals.
Remarks: Do not infer short covering from price direction alone.

API Period: Exact report date and valid source as-of dates
Logic: Generate 70-110 words combining short interest SI/float borrow fee shortable shares utilization duration margins and days to cover; identify the strongest driver and uncertainty.
Remarks: Canonical field for the current template; replaces the underspecified legacy Short Selling Data & Analysis row.

Logic: Generate 65-100 words summarizing dominant narratives sentiment direction abnormal volume new filings and verified events while separating speculation.
Remarks: Must cite report metrics or event titles and state missing-data uncertainty.

API Period: Current report snapshot and known scheduled events
Logic: Generate 60-90 words stating next-session risk posture conditions that strengthen or weaken it and important pre-market checks.
Remarks: No unsupported forecast price target or trading instruction.

Logic: Generate 70-110 words of prioritized role-specific actions for management investor relations legal/compliance and capital markets with evidence.
Remarks: Every action must cite a report signal or known event.
